prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This regulatory judgement relates to bpha Limited, which predominantly operates in the East of England. The assessment and standards mentioned are specific to England and do not apply to Scotland, where housing regulations and governance standards are managed by different authorities.
